name: Mff Capital Investments Limited
analysis: MFF has all Fibonacci EMAs in full bullish alignment. EMAs are compressed, suggesting a big move is building. Price making higher highs and higher lows — healthy uptrend structure. Price has pulled back and is testing the 34 EMA at A$4.9284. This is a core Fibonacci pullback to a key trend EMA. Strong confluence zone at A$4.9545 where 5 levels cluster. Trade setup: entry A$4.9284, stop A$4.8114, target A$4.9933. Risk/reward is 0.56:1. Weekly EMAs are bullish.
